commands: vp dlx --help # should show help message
vp x --help # should work with x alias
vp dlx -s -y cowsay hello # should run cowsay with npm exec and auto-confirm
vp dlx -s -y cowsay@1.6.0 hello # should run specific version
vp dlx -s -y -p cowsay -p lolcatjs cowsay hello # should run with multiple packages
